block_01: Big Score has been the biggest tournament ever held on IQ Option to date: with the insane $155,336 prize pool, it attracted almost 10,000 traders. Last month, we contacted several of the winners in order to ask them about their experience of the tournament and their victory.
block_02: Weruri Bunchawi, who lives in Thailand, shared her thoughts on coming 4th in the tournament and revealed her trading secrets. In the interview, she talks about her life, family, trading strategies and techniques. We are delighted to have her feedback and hope that you find her interview fascinating!
block_03: Read the full article to learn everything about Big Score’s winner.
